status_model.c_abi_only: raw cross-language ABI is packaged; no friendly facade
status_model.host_only: host scaffold/simulation exists; production firmware is separate
status_model.heartbeat_only: a second core runs, but no application placement/executor contract
status_model.conformance: portable-core self-test exists; no portable provider claim
status_model.physical_ad_hoc: physical evidence exists, but no reusable restoring command
status_model.provider: portable provider implementation and target build exist

domains.ownership_rule: shared contracts live in crates; sensor and external-library implementations live in adapters; applications live in apps

sensor_families.scope: common MPU accel, gyro, temperature, identity, diagnostics, and recovery
common MPU accel, gyro, temperature, identity, diagnostics, and recovery; magnetometer acquisition is not claimed
embedded-hal I2C identity, fixed-point accel/gyro decode, diagnostics, and recovery

library_members.known_portability_boundary: 0.3.0 uses ArduinoNRF TwoWire pinSDA/pinSCL extensions; AVR also requires a newer C++ aggregate model

domains.ownership_rule: shared link contracts and protocol arithmetic live in crates; hardware and external-library implementations live in categorized adapters; applications live in categorized apps

adapter_families.scope: exclusive HAL lease, bounded payload, link state, deadline and window-budget accounting

library_members.known_portability_boundary: 0.1.0 does not compile on ArduinoNRF because upstream RC522 and SX127x String(uint8_t, HEX) calls are ambiguous

library_members.known_boundary: the pinned library surface and compile are verified; a friendly Nobro Arduino facade is not yet present

domains.ownership_rule: shared frame, admission, backpressure, and accounting contracts live in crates; sensor/DMA libraries remain external members or categorized adapters; applications compose camera, AI, storage, and transport

library_members.known_boundary: clean pinned compile on all three profiles; Nobro physical adapter evidence currently covers OV3660 only, with full pre-test flash restoration

required_tokens: Generate host-readable contracts and production firmware

integrations.note: Generic bridge covers every nimu::IMUSensor at the pinned 0.3.0 surface. Compile proof is ArduinoNRF-only; upstream 0.3.0 is not portable to stock AVR, Renesas, or ESP32 TwoWire APIs.
Pinned 0.1.0: RC522 compiles on UNO R4 and LoRa compiles on ESP32-S3; HC06, HC12, NRF24L01, and PN532 remain explicit upstream stubs. ArduinoNRF has an upstream String-constructor portability error.

Pinned 0.2.0 compiles with the Nobro adapter for OV2640/AI-Thinker, OV3660/XIAO ESP32-S3 Sense, and OV5640/ESP32-S3-CAM profiles. A state-restoring OV3660 run captured 5/5 valid JPEG frames with no drops; OV2640/OV5640 Nobro physical runs remain open.

Wave 57 placement contract (plan_placement, per-core admission) + Wave 58 real core1 reactor draining a cross-core MpmcChannel; compile-verified for thumbv8m + host/Miri cross-core stall model. Physical dual-core throughput/isolation on real RP2350 silicon is bench-gated (no board on the primary bench). PHYSICALLY VERIFIED on a real Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W (RP2350) 2026-07-12: self-DFU/BOOTSEL flash, read back all_pass=1 timebase=1 cores=2 with core1 draining the cross-core MpmcChannel (core1_acc==core1_processed*3 exactly).

Time/deadline/USB and the seven portable subsystems passed a state-restoring physical run. I2C/SPI/PWM are real embedded-hal provider adapters and target-build clean, but remain physically unpromoted until a connected application exercises each. Event capture, lease parity, and deep self-test are absent.

Real silicon used both LX7 cores and processed 80/80 bounded synthetic audio/camera envelopes through deterministic AI work: 64 audio, 16 camera, attributed queue backpressure, zero misses, 630 us maximum observed latency, and all_pass=1. This is not physical audio capture or camera capture; those remain separate ecosystem/HIL scopes.
Reusable capture/flash/grade/restore orchestration is maintainer-only and must never be added to the public tools tree. This row records sanitized status only.
